texts.orig: Scale-Up and Testing of Advanced Polaris Membrane CO2 Capture Technology (DE-FE0031591)
texts.text: Scale-Up and Testing of Advanced Polaris Membrane CO2 Capture Technology (DE-FE0031591)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vincent Batoon, David Hicks, Ivy Huang, Thomas Hofmann, Jay Kniep, Tim Merkel, Craig Paulaha, Erik Westling
texts.text: Vincent Batoon, David Hicks, Ivy Huang, Thomas Hofmann, Jay Kniep, Tim Merkel, Craig Paulaha, Erik Westling

texts.orig: U.S. Department of Energy National Energy Technology Laboratory Carbon Capture - 2020 Integrated Review Webinar October 7, 2020

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Award name: Scale-Up and Testing of Advanced Polaris Membrane CO2 Capture Technology (DE-FE0031591)
texts.text: Award name: Scale-Up and Testing of Advanced Polaris Membrane CO2 Capture Technology (DE-FE0031591)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: $8.2 million DOE; $2.6 million cost share ($10.7 million total)
texts.text: $8.2 million DOE; $2.6 million cost share ($10.7 million total)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: MTR, TCM, Trimeric, Siemens/Dresser Rand, WorleyParsons
texts.text: MTR, TCM, Trimeric, Siemens/Dresser Rand, WorleyParsons

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Design, build, and operate a system at TCM with Gen 2 Polaris modules
texts.text: Design, build, and operate a system at TCM with Gen 2 Polaris modules

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The project is organized in three phases:
texts.text: The project is organized in three phases:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Phase 2 - Build and install system at TCM
texts.text: Phase 2 - Build and install system at TCM

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Phase 3 - Operate system, analyze results, decommissioning
texts.text: Phase 3 - Operate system, analyze results, decommissioning

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Large-Pilot Testing at WY ITC, WY (DE-FE31587)
texts.text: Large-Pilot Testing at WY ITC, WY (DE-FE31587)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: • Phase I - Design 200 TPD pilot; secure host site
texts.text: Phase I - Design 200 TPD pilot; secure host site

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: • Phase III - Fabricate, install and operate (TRL 7 - 8)
texts.text: Phase III - Fabricate, install and operate (TRL 7 - 8)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: • Reduces membrane area and energy use
texts.text: Reduces membrane area and energy use

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Selective recycle to boiler was validated in testing at B&W
texts.text: Selective recycle to boiler was validated in testing at B&W

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Gen1 Polaris evaluated in extensive testing at NCCC (>11,000hours)
texts.text: Gen1 Polaris evaluated in extensive testing at NCCC (>11,000hours)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Conducted comparison of Gen1 and 2 membrane
texts.text: Conducted comparison of Gen1 and 2 membrane

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · CO2 removal performance was good, but pressure drop was relatively high
texts.text: CO2 removal performance was good, but pressure drop was relatively high

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · MTR pilot system was tested at NCCC and B&W
texts.text: MTR pilot system was tested at NCCC and B&W

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: NCCC Testing Confirmed Better Gen2 Performance
texts.text: NCCC Testing Confirmed Better Gen2 Performance

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Higher permeance reduces capital cost and footprint
texts.text: Higher permeance reduces capital cost and footprint

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: New Modules Have Lower Pressure Drop
texts.text: New Modules Have Lower Pressure Drop

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Reduced pressure-dropwith new module saves ~15 MWe of energy at full-scale
texts.text: Reduced pressure-dropwith new module saves ~15 MWe of energy at full-scale

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Membranes are best for bulk separations.  There is a sweet spot for the technology between 50 - 80% capture
texts.text: Membranes are best for bulk separations.  There is a sweet spot for the technology between 50 - 80% capture

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Selective recycle design reduces capture cost by as much as $25/tonne at 90% capture (including boiler de-rate measured at B&W)
texts.text: Selective recycle design reduces capture cost by as much as $25/tonne at 90% capture (including boiler de-rate measured at B&W)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Scale-up Gen 2 Polaris packaged in low-pressure-drop, lowcost module stacks and test at TCM
texts.text: Scale-up Gen 2 Polaris packaged in low-pressure-drop, lowcost module stacks and test at TCM

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Demonstrate 'containerized' skid as final form factor for future large-scale systems
texts.text: Demonstrate 'containerized' skid as final form factor for future large-scale systems

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Test pilot system (~1 MW) over range of CO 2 capture rates and feed CO 2 content
texts.text: Test pilot system (~1 MW) over range of CO 2 capture rates and feed CO 2 content

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TCM Test Will Use Improved Modules
texts.text: TCM Test Will Use Improved Modules

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All Polaris membrane modules for TCM test skid have been finished and Q/C tested
texts.text: All Polaris membrane modules for TCM test skid have been finished and Q/C tested

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cutaway of Container Skid with Membrane Stacks
texts.text: Cutaway of Container Skid with Membrane Stacks

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Membrane skid will be installed at TCM '3 rd site' being developed for new technologies
texts.text: Membrane skid will be installed at TCM '3 rd site' being developed for new technologies

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: View of TCM with 3 rd site in foreground
texts.text: View of TCM with 3 rd site in foreground

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Close up view of 3rd site foundation
texts.text: Close up view of 3rd site foundation

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: · Site is ready for system installation
texts.text: · Site is ready for system installation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 2 stage system with ability to test air sweep step (stream 5) and varying feed CO2 content using recycle (stream 9)
texts.text: 2 stage system with ability to test air sweep step (stream 5) and varying feed CO2 content using recycle (stream 9)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Can test a range of capture rates from 50-90%
texts.text: Can test a range of capture rates from 50-90%

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · System will produce ~85% CO2; does not include CPU
texts.text: System will produce ~85% CO2; does not include CPU

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Skid design finalized at the end of 2019 after Hazop with TCM
texts.text: Skid design finalized at the end of 2019 after Hazop with TCM

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · System contains four membrane module stacks on the top floor container
texts.text: System contains four membrane module stacks on the top floor container

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Bottom floor houses fans, vacuum pumps, controls, BOP
texts.text: Bottom floor houses fans, vacuum pumps, controls, BOP

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Construction is ongoing and has been impacted by Covid-19; supply chain and fabricator delays
texts.text: Construction is ongoing and has been impacted by Covid-19; supply chain and fabricator delays

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · FAT now scheduled for end of October
texts.text: FAT now scheduled for end of October

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Vary capture rate without sweep step or spillback
texts.text: Vary capture rate without sweep step or spillback

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Vary capture rate with sweep step using spillback to mimic enriched CO2 feed content
texts.text: Vary capture rate with sweep step using spillback to mimic enriched CO2 feed content

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · During these parametric steady state tests, monitor separation efficiency, system pressure drops, and gas compositions to CPU
texts.text: During these parametric steady state tests, monitor separation efficiency, system pressure drops, and gas compositions to CPU

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Run dynamic tests (startup/shutdown, load change) to document membraneresponse time
texts.text: Run dynamic tests (startup/shutdown, load change) to document membraneresponse time

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · At end of program, vary particulate feed to system and monitor fouling/pressure drop
texts.text: At end of program, vary particulate feed to system and monitor fouling/pressure drop

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Final test plan to include input from CCSI2
texts.text: Final test plan to include input from CCSI2

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All Gen 2 Polaris membrane modules have been made and Q/C tested; ready for installation on the TCM skid
texts.text: All Gen 2 Polaris membrane modules have been made and Q/C tested; ready for installation on the TCM skid

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · System is under construction; FAT is planned for the end of October
texts.text: System is under construction; FAT is planned for the end of October

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · TCM site preparation is complete; ready to receive system
texts.text: TCM site preparation is complete; ready to receive system

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Plan is for skid to be delivered to TCM and positioned at site by the end of the year
texts.text: Plan is for skid to be delivered to TCM and positioned at site by the end of the year

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Testing at TCM (BP3) planned for first half of 2021
texts.text: Testing at TCM (BP3) planned for first half of 2021

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Containerized membrane stack, demonstrated at TCM, is envisioned as the final form factor for this capture technology
texts.text: Containerized membrane stack, demonstrated at TCM, is envisioned as the final form factor for this capture technology

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Future, larger systems, such as the proposed large pilot at the Wyoming ITC, will simply use multiples of this modular building block
texts.text: Future, larger systems, such as the proposed large pilot at the Wyoming ITC, will simply use multiples of this modular building block

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Main goal is to validate recent innovations in membranes (Gen 2 Polaris) and modules (low-pressure-drop) in field testing at TCM
texts.text: Main goal is to validate recent innovations in membranes (Gen 2 Polaris) and modules (low-pressure-drop) in field testing at TCM

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Membranes will be packaged in a container that represents the final form factor for this capture technology
texts.text: Membranes will be packaged in a container that represents the final form factor for this capture technology

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Project is nearing the end of the construction phase (BP2) with testing (BP3) planned in 2021
texts.text: Project is nearing the end of the construction phase (BP2) with testing (BP3) planned in 2021

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · U.S. Department of Energy, National Energy Technology Laboratory
texts.text: U.S. Department of Energy, National Energy Technology Laboratory
